title: Assistant Store Manager - Tanishq Global Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Tanishq Global Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tanishq Global Group! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tanishq Global Group:
Tanishq Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq Global Group!
